CREATE TABLE test_table (val String, default_val Int256);
SELECT toInt256OrDefault(val, CAST('0', 'Int256')) FROM test_table WHERE default_val > 5;
SELECT t1.val, toInt256OrDefault(t2.val, CAST('0', 'Int256')) FROM test_table AS t1 JOIN test_table AS t2 ON t1.default_val = t2.default_val;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT toInt256OrDefault(val, CAST('-1', 'Int256')) FROM test_table) AS sub;
SELECT SUM(toInt256OrDefault(val, CAST('-1', 'Int256'))) FROM (SELECT val FROM test_table WHERE val NOT LIKE '%[^0-9]%' );
SELECT val, toInt256OrDefault(val, CAST('0', 'Int256')) AS converted FROM test_table WHERE converted < 100 ORDER BY converted DESC;
